title: Polish CORE 2000 Words and Phrases
summary: The local app imports the provided Polish CORE 2000 PDF as offline vocabulary cards, grouped by CEFR-style level and inferred real-life scenario.
items: A1, A2, B1, B2, and C1 frequency-rank levels
Scenario labels for food, travel, work, school, health, home, nature, activities, and general core vocabulary
Polish and English device TTS for each card

title: Forvo: Useful Travel Phrases in Polish
summary: Forvo's Polish travel guide groups practical phrases by situation: everyday phrases, banking, receiving care, shopping, getting around, drinking and dining, and directions. The local app uses the guide as a text phrase knowledge source and reads the Polish cards with Supertonic instead of Forvo recordings.

title: Quizlet: Kattarynka Polish Sets
summary: A Polish study-set direction used to shape the local learning database. The app keeps original Polish cards locally rather than copying user-authored Quizlet card text wholesale.
items: Supertonic read-aloud for Polish and English

title: Quizlet: Polish Swadesh Verbs
summary: A high-frequency verb study direction. The local app includes an original 55-card Polish verb category with Supertonic read-aloud for Polish and English.

title: Elementary Polish: University of Illinois
summary: Frank Gladney's Elementary Polish course direction is represented as beginner grammar study material. The local app includes short original grammar cards aligned with early topics such as basic sentences, questions, gender agreement, and common case patterns.

title: Polish Learner News

images.alt: Bear spotted wandering Przemyśl city centre at night
Ustka named Poland beach of the year 2026

summary: Polish Learner News offers news from Poland in Polish for language learners, with vocabulary, exercises, translations, and listening practice. The local app stores current headline metadata for a daily reading habit.
items: Bear Spotted Wandering Przemyśl City Centre at Night
Ustka Named Poland's Beach of the Year 2026 After 13 Years
Polish Livestream Shatters Record For Cancer Charity
EU Parliament weighs lifting Kamiński immunity
Poland to Make School Health Education Compulsory
Northern Lights Illuminate Skies Over Poland

title: Polski na dobry start: A1 Grammar Path
summary: The provided textbook is converted into compact grammar lessons and A1/A2 scenario cards: introductions, personal data, family, work, shopping, food, housing, transport, health, school, and everyday routines.
items: 23 grammar lessons with rules, patterns, examples, and quick checks
Scenario vocabulary drawn from the textbook topic map
A1 first, with selected A2 practical extensions for work, school, housing, and administration
Text-based study notes; TTS is used for study cards and examples

title: Rozmówki polsko-angielskie: Practical Situations
summary: The provided phrasebook is folded into scenario cards for communication, signs, shopping, restaurants, banks, health, city directions, transport, offices, emergencies, and public services.
items: Practical A1/A2 phrase cards with English meanings
Scenario labels for filters and flashcard testing
Office, doctor, transport, housing, and shopping survival language
Original compact study wording based on the phrasebook structure
